features: PACK CONTENTS: Set of 3 Febreze Air Freshener sprays in Alpine Escape fragrance, 185ml each, plus a complimentary decorative fridge magnet
DUAL ACTION: 2-in-1 formula that both fights unwanted odours and freshens the air with a crisp mountain-inspired scent
LONG-LASTING FRESHNESS: Alpine Escape fragrance brings the invigorating scent of snow-capped mountains and winter forests to your home
VERSATILE USE: Perfect for bathrooms, living rooms, bedrooms, and any indoor space requiring instant freshening
CONVENIENT DESIGN: Easy-to-use spray bottle with ergonomic grip for precise application and even coverage
description: Product description Transform your living space with this Febreze Air Mist in Alpine Escape fragrance, featuring a generous 185ml capacity in a convenient pack of three. This 2-in-1 air freshener not only masks but actively fights odours while leaving behind a crisp, mountain-fresh scent inspired by snow-capped peaks and winter cabins. The ergonomic spray bottle design ensures easy application throughout any room. As an added bonus, this set includes a delightful decorative fridge magnet featuring charming British seaside designs. Perfect for bathrooms, living rooms, or any space requiring a burst of freshness, these air fresheners provide long-lasting fragrance coverage. The Alpine Escape scent brings the invigorating essence of a winter wonderland into your home, with notes of fresh pine and cool mountain air. Keep one in different rooms or store extras for when you need them most. The sophisticated packaging features a winter scene that complements any home décor. Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP, UK

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Home Deodorizing, Odour Elimination, Room Freshening
